form.formComment: Last start 5th (40m Fr1) over 2180m at Stawell beaten 35 m by Kamaran (2:51.00) in No NR on April 3 at $19. Two runs back 4th (40m Fr1) over 2570m at Ararat beaten 35 m by Kamaran (3:23.50) in No NR on March 23 at $3.80. Others read better. Must do a lot more.

Checked and trotted roughly as Jakarta broke on the first turn.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth after showing early speed, behind Kyvalley Jetstream at Melton over 1720m in a 0W/15 0K stake on March 28 at $41. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Kamaran at Stawell over 2180m in a No NR on April 3 at $9. Expected to go well again.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth after a quick start, behind Kyvalley Jetstream at Melton over 1720m in a 0W/15 0K stake on March 28 at $16. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second after being driven well back, behind Bennie And The Jets at Melton over 2240m in a 0W/15 0K stake on April 4 at $41. Rates highly. Peaking now and has winning prospects.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 4 m second behind Kyvalley Judge at Kilmore over 2180m NR 56 to 64 last start. Before that was beaten 1.5 metres third at Bendigo over 2150m in No NR on March 25. Strong claims.

form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 4th (FT Fr3) over 2570m at Geelong, beaten 22 m by Imperial Monarch (3:16.40) in No NR on March 13 at $15. At the start before 6th (20m Fr1) over 2570m at Ararat, at the bell was 6th-10.9 beaten 11 m by More Wanted (3:17.90) in No NR on February 27 at $12. Has claims.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into seventh behind Imperial Monarch at Geelong over 2570m in a No NR on March 13 at $7.50. Performed better the start before with a good run when 3rd (20m Fr3) over 2570m at Ararat was 7th-12 at the bell, beaten 1.1 m by More Wanted (3:17.90) in No NR on February 27 at $12. Can measure up with her A-game.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1720m at Melton was 6th-12.82 at the bell, beaten 19 m by Pinnie (2:04.80) in NR 70 to 85 on March 28 at $7. Before that, broke in score up and was out of position at the start 8th (Fr4) over 2240m at Melton, beaten 55 m by El Resamo (2:44.50) in NR 70 to 85 on March 21 at $23. Fitter again and owns a strong record at this circuit and distance.
